tool_calls.content:
sysctl net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit; sysctl net.ipv44.icmp_ratemask; sysctl net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts || true
net.ipv4.icmp_ratelimit = 1000
net.ipv4.icmp_ratemask = 6168
net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts = 1

tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 10/second --limit-burst 20 -j DROP || true\niptables -L -n -v || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -A OUTPUT -p icmp -m limit --limit 10//second --limit-burst 20 -j DROP || true
